reference: It is possible that the particular group of muscles is twitching continuously. The basic problem could be in the spine or the nerve may be getting irritated in its course. A neurologist's opinion will help you to get a diagnosis and further investigations and treatment can be pursued accordingly.
text: It is possible that the particular group of muscles is twitching continuously. The basic problem could be in the spine, or the nerve may be getting irritated in its course. A neurologist opinion will help you to get a diagnosis, and further investigations and treatment can be pursued accordingly.
